forbiddenPatterns.why: Legacy production domains must not remain in the public continuation so contributors do not keep shipping the old brand surface.
forbiddenPatterns.expectedFix: Replace the legacy hostnames with eqMacFree-owned launch-surface values or remove the stale reference entirely.

forbiddenPatterns.why: The public repo must point to the eqMacFree origin so launch artifacts and contributor guidance stay aligned.
forbiddenPatterns.expectedFix: Swap the old owner/repo reference for the eqMacFree repository path everywhere it appears.

forbiddenPatterns.why: Bundle identifiers must be unique to the public continuation so signing, updates, and installed apps do not collide with the old product.
forbiddenPatterns.expectedFix: Rename the stale bundle identifiers to the eqMacFree identifiers used by the current app targets.

restrictedWording.why: Contributor-facing copy should not imply private paid tiers in public surfaces unless a documented exception applies.
restrictedWording.expectedFix: Remove the paid-tier wording or move it only into the explicitly allowed contributor documentation surfaces.

alignmentChecks.why: The README should keep the public launch inventory visible so contributors can see what is available now versus deferred work.
alignmentChecks.expectedFix: Keep the three feature buckets present and update their wording if the public inventory changes.

alignmentChecks.why: The roadmap note should preserve the reimplementation framing so the public backlog is not mistaken for hidden unlock work.
alignmentChecks.expectedFix: Keep the reimplementation wording and the explicit note that this list is not a hidden unlock checklist.
requiredSnippets: not a checklist for unlocking hidden code

alignmentChecks.why: The UI launch surface should keep support and update routing pointed at public GitHub destinations instead of drifting toward legacy hosted product endpoints.
alignmentChecks.expectedFix: Keep the repo-backed routing constants for README, releases, and issue chooser aligned with the eqMacFree GitHub repository.

alignmentChecks.why: The native launch constants should keep support, bug reporting, trusted URLs, and update behavior aligned with public GitHub routing or intentionally neutralized endpoints.
alignmentChecks.expectedFix: Keep the native constants anchored to the eqMacFree GitHub repo, issue chooser, GitHub trusted domains, and nil update feeds for the current launch model.
